title: acalypha glandulifolia
intro: Acalypha glandulifolia, also known as the velvet leaf or glandular acalypha, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Acalypha glandulifolia include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as acting as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Acalypha glandulifolia can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
